title: Mini Naan Pizzas
description: These mini naan pizzas are a quick, customizable, and fun meal perfect for a family night. Kids love assembling their own, making dinner an interactive and delicious experience.
instructions: Preheat your oven to 400°F (200°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper or foil.
Place the mini naan breads on the prepared baking sheet, ensuring they are not overlapping.
Spread about 2 tablespoons of pizza sauce evenly over each naan bread, leaving a small border for the crust.
Sprinkle shredded mozzarella cheese generously over the sauce on each naan.
Add desired toppings like mini pepperoni, diced bell peppers, and sliced black olives. Encourage kids to add their own!
Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the cheese is bubbly and lightly golden, and the naan edges are crispy.
Carefully remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
tips: Let kids choose their own toppings from a selection of pre-prepped ingredients to make it extra fun and encourage them to eat their veggies.
For a crispier crust, lightly toast the naan bread in the oven for 2-3 minutes before adding sauce and toppings.
Feel free to substitute naan with pita bread or English muffins for a similar quick pizza base.
